content.text: QueryPie provides a web terminal for executing commands and a web SFTP for performing various tasks through a web browser.
tab at the top and select the Role to use for access.
If no Role is assigned, the Default Role is automatically selected.
STEP 2 Select the server you need to access from the left, and choose the account from the right.
STEP 3 After selecting the protocol, click the
You can connect to multiple servers and switch between them seamlessly.
button on the top toolbar to open multiple sessions.
The web terminal supports a search function.
